title: Earth Animals: Extra Drops
description: Mob Drops for variants from Earth Animals!
body:
Adds extra mob drops for variants from [**Earth Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals). This was separated from the full pack to allow for a more vanilla experience if desired.
List of Extra Drops | **Variant** | **Special Drop(s)** | |:--------------------:|---------------------| | Muddy Pig | Mud (25%), Red Tulip (25%) | | Moobloom | Dandelion (0-2) | | Moolip | Pink Tulip (0-2) | | Cluckshroom | Red Mushroom (0-2) | | Skeleton Wolf | Bone (1-2) |
Wooly Cows and Umbra Cows can be given their wool drop from Minecraft Earth with the [**Wooly Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wooly-animals) data pack. ## ### MintRefresh:
